cmpl_version.description: The target version of the Cmpl Builder.

environment.description: Environment variables applied to every build process. Values are also available as ${NAME} tokens in profile strings.

name.description: Unique identifier for this build profile (e.g. windows-release).

build_system.description: The build routing engine to use.

toolchain.description: The target compiler for 'direct' builds: msvc, gcc, clang, or a custom compiler command/path.

arch.description: Target architecture for MSVC tooling (passed to VsDevCmd as -arch). Defaults to the host OS architecture.

build_type.description: Build configuration. Maps to -c for dotnet, CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE/--config for cmake, /p:Configuration for msbuild.

dotnet_publish.description: For 'dotnet' builds, run 'dotnet publish' instead of 'dotnet build'.

source_dir.description: Path to the source code or solution/project file. Relative paths resolve against the .cmpl file's directory.

output_dir.description: Path where the build artifacts will be placed. Created if missing. Relative paths resolve against the .cmpl file's directory.

defines.description: Preprocessor definitions for 'direct' builds (-D / /D), or cache entries (-D) for cmake.

flags.description: Raw arguments passed directly to the compiler/tool.

pre_build.description: Shell commands run before the build, from the .cmpl file's directory.

post_build.description: Shell commands run after a successful build, from the .cmpl file's directory.
